channel.title: Image Generation on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Image Generation on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: MAI-Image-2.5 in Microsoft Foundry model catalog
item.description:
Microsoft Foundry has added MAI-Image-2.5 to the model catalog in public preview. It is described as the next generation of Microsoft’s in-house image generation model, with improvements in photorealism, prompt fidelity, and generation speed over MAI-Image-2.

  • Source: Azure Updates
